description_text: 10PC Black Carbon Fiber Look Universal Vortex Generators Roof Shark Fins Spoiler Wing Kit for Car Truck SUV Specification: 【Type】：Eagle Claw Style Shark Fin 【Color】：Carbon Fiber 【Material】: ABS Feature: Improves Fuel Economy. Increased Down-force. Reduces Drag. Increase Top Speed and Performance. Made of High Quality Abs Plastic Carbon Fiber Look. Easy Installation. No Modifications or Trimming Required. Can be Painted to Match your Vehicle ColorGive your vehicle a more aggressive look in seconds. Easy Installation. Installation Introduction 1. Clean the installation area thoroughly with car wash soap. Dry thoroughly and make sure the surface is smooth and free of debris. 2.Before removing the tape cover, test the spoiler to see if it fits your car and if it does, mark the location with tape. For better results, you may need another person to help you. 3. Remove the adhesive backing. 4. Carefully align the spoiler in the correct position. Make sure the position is correct before applying pressure. 5. Apply pressure to the tape, making sure it is completely secure before driving. The adhesive will take 1 hour to set.
